name: agentbase
description: Visual agent orchestration: build agent graphs with LLM-gated criteria edges, run them against Ollama, audit everything.

scripts.postbuild: APP=$(find dist -name '*.app' -maxdepth 3 -print -quit) && APP_NAME=$(basename "$APP") && rm -rf "/Applications/$APP_NAME" && cp -r "$APP" "/Applications/$APP_NAME" && { test ! -e "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" && test ! -L "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" && ln -s "/Applications/$APP_NAME" "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" || true; }
scripts.postbuild:mac: APP=$(find dist -name '*.app' -maxdepth 3 -print -quit) && APP_NAME=$(basename "$APP") && rm -rf "/Applications/$APP_NAME" && cp -r "$APP" "/Applications/$APP_NAME" && { test ! -e "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" && test ! -L "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" && ln -s "/Applications/$APP_NAME" "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" || true; }
